title: Fundamental Concepts of Group Theory (Grimaldi)
description: A visual representation of the core algebraic structures in group theory, showing how groups are built from simpler structures and their defining properties.
relationships: A Set with a Binary Operation must satisfy Closure
Closure and Associativity define a Semigroup
A Semigroup with an Identity Element becomes a Monoid
A Monoid where every element has an Inverse becomes a Group
A Group that is also Commutative is an Abelian Group
